response.step_by_step_log: The video starts with a dialogue. At 00:11, a song begins. At 00:33, on-screen text identifies the song as "LOVE.EXE" and the composer/lyricist as "桃井はるこ" (Halko Momoi). I searched for "LOVE.EXE Halko Momoi Japanese and English lyrics". I found the lyrics in Japanese and constructed an English translation based on those lyrics for the final JSON. The video ends with a dialogue. The performer in the video is identified as Shishiro Botan from the hashtag #獅白ぼたん生誕祭2025.
response.global_summary: VTuber Shishiro Botan performs a cover of the song "LOVE.EXE", originally by Halko Momoi, framed by opening and closing dialogue segments.

scenes.description: Initial dialogue scene with Shishiro Botan.
Shishiro Botan performs "LOVE.EXE" on a digital-themed stage. Text [LOVE.EXE, 作詞・作曲: 桃井はるこ] appears on-screen at 00:33.
